tool_args.label: PTC Data Radio Supply and Delivery Contract

payload.project_name: PTC Data Radio Supply and Delivery Contract
payload.description: Award of a noncompetitive estimated quantity contract to GE Grid Solutions, LLC for the supply and delivery of Positive Train Control (PTC) Data Radios for Metro-North Railroad and Long Island Rail Road

evidence_refs.source_quote: supply and delivery of Positive Train Control ("PTC") Data Radios
Award of a contract for the supply of Positive Train Control Data Radios for Metro-North Railroad and Long Island Rail Road
Contract Term (including Options, if any): November 1, 2024–November 30, 2031
Total Amount: $3,797,000 (estimated)
an initial lot of 250 units will be supplied over a five-year delivery schedule

The total price of $3.8 million consists of project engineering (recurring and nonrecurring costs), hardware and firmware integration, factory validation, prototype commissioning, and the first 250 production units
Contract Term (including Options, if any): November 1, 2024–November 30, 2031

tool_args.label: Firm fixed price per additional radio unit

evidence_refs.source_quote: Should the Railroads need to procure additional radios (beyond the quantity of 250) during the contract term, the negotiated firm fixed price will be $2,950

payload.claim_text: The current PTC Data Radios are now obsolete and need to be updated and replaced in order to maintain compliance with the PTC federal mandate.
payload.description: PTC Data Radios are obsolete and must be replaced for federal mandate compliance

evidence_refs.source_quote: the current PTC Data Radios are now obsolete and need to be updated and replaced in order to maintain compliance with the PTC federal mandate

payload.claim_text: PTC, a signaling and communications technology, was designed and implemented to make commuter rail safer through GPS-based safety technology with the ability to stop a train and prevent train-to-train collisions, overspeed derailments, and unauthorized train movement.

evidence_refs.source_quote: PTC, a signaling and communications technology, was designed and implemented to make commuter rail safer through GPS-based safety technology with the ability to stop a train and prevent train-to-train collisions, overspeed derailments, and unauthorized train movement

payload.claim_text: GE and Siemens both took exception to several terms and conditions of the contract, including cybersecurity requirements. Both bids were therefore determined to be non-responsive.

evidence_refs.source_quote: GE and Siemens both took exception to several terms and conditions of the contract, including cybersecurity requirements. Both bids were therefore determined to be non-responsive

tool_args.label: Negotiated with GE as low apparent bidder

payload.claim_text: Siemens' technical approach and cost were not economically viable, therefore MNR elected to negotiate with GE.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Siemens' technical approach and cost were not economically viable, therefore MNR elected to negotiate with GE

tool_args.label: GE as OEM for original PTC radios

payload.claim_text: GE was the original equipment manufacturer who supplied the original PTC Radios for both the MNR and LIRR rolling stock fleets. As the OEM, GE has historically supported the legacy data radios for the Railroads and their performance has been satisfactory.

evidence_refs.source_quote: GE was the original equipment manufacturer who supplied the original PTC Radios for both the MNR and LIRR rolling stock fleets
As the OEM, GE has historically supported the legacy data radios for the Railroads and their performance has been satisfactory

payload.claim_text: The MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights has set zero percent MWBE/SDVOB goals on this contract due to the lack of subcontracting opportunities and MWBE/SDVOB firms in the marketplace.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights has set zero percent MWBE/SDVOB goals on this contract due to the lack of subcontracting opportunities and MWBE/SDVOB firms in the marketplace

payload.claim_text: Its design will include backward compatibility to work with the legacy data radio currently in use by the Railroads.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Its design will include backward compatibility to work with the legacy data radio currently in use by the Railroads

tool_args.label: GE certified not doing business in Russia

payload.claim_text: GE has certified that pursuant to EO 16, it is not doing business in Russia.

evidence_refs.source_quote: GE has certified that pursuant to EO 16, it is not doing business in Russia

payload.description: Supply and delivery of PTC Data Radios - next generation 220 MHz radio system for train-to-wayside communications, replacing obsolete units for MNR and LIRR fleets
locations: Long Island Rail Road rolling stock

locations_normalized.raw_text: Long Island Rail Road rolling stock

evidence_refs.source_quote: PTC requires a communication network using a 220 MHz radio system, located both on a railcar and the wayside, that verifies GPS train locations and transmits data between the train, the PTC Control Center, and the Wayside Signal System
supply and delivery of Positive Train Control ("PTC") Data Radios
